title: Grouped Bar Chart
excerpt: It would be great to have a simple grouped bar chart feature. We only have stacked bar charts and bar charts available via the chart widget. Essentially you would just change the “Stack By” to “Group By” to group your ba…

posts.author: adodd12345 (Alex Dodd)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have a simple grouped bar chart feature. We only have stacked bar charts and bar charts available via the chart widget. Essentially you would just change the “Stack By” to “Group By” to group your bars together. Should be a simple add on.
